title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. stabile
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. stabile, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. stabile are said to provide relief from pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a beneficial herb for the immune system. Herbal preparations of hawkweed can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
